assembly_instructions: Pilotless two-seat passenger eVTOL with a central spheroidal cabin perched on twin tubular landing skids. Eight tubular composite arms radiate horizontally from a central hub, each arm tip carrying a coaxial pair of brushless motors driving fixed-pitch propellers (16 rotors total). All major systems — propulsion, batteries, flight controllers, command-and-control link — are designed with full redundancy.

info.summary: Two-seat autonomous multirotor eVTOL air taxi from EHang — the world's first pilotless passenger-carrying aircraft to be granted a Type Certificate (CAAC, October 2023), followed by Production and Standard Airworthiness Certificates.
info.description: The EH216-S is a passenger-carrying autonomous aerial vehicle (AAV) developed by Guangzhou EHang Intelligent Technology. It is a true "drone-style" flying car: a central spheroidal cabin seats two passengers, while eight tubular arms radiate from the hub, each arm tip mounting a coaxial pair of brushless motors driving fixed-pitch propellers — sixteen rotors in all. There is no onboard pilot and no flight stick: passengers select a destination on a 12-inch touchscreen and the aircraft executes a pre-cleared route under supervision from a ground command-and-control center. The Civil Aviation Administration of China (CAAC) accepted the type-certification application in January 2021 and issued the Type Certificate on 13 October 2023 — the world's first TC for a pilotless passenger-carrying eVTOL. A Production Certificate and a Standard Airworthiness Certificate followed in 2024, clearing the EH216-S for serial manufacture and commercial operation.
info.operator: EHang AAV operators (Guangzhou, Hefei, and other Chinese cities)
info.contractor: Guangzhou EHang Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd.
info.status: Type-, Production-, and Standard-Airworthiness-Certified by CAAC; in commercial service

facts.label: Control
facts.value: Pilotless; passenger touchscreen + ground command-and-control center

sources.title: EHang — Successfully Obtains CAAC Type Certificate for EH216-S (official, 2023-10-13)
EHang — Standard Airworthiness Certificate & Customer Delivery (official)
New Atlas — A closer look at the EHang 216 pilotless air taxi (detailed specs)

parts.name: Landing Skid (Port)
parts.role: Tubular composite landing skid, port side. Spreads ground load and absorbs touchdown energy.

parts.name: Landing Skid (Starboard)
parts.role: Tubular composite landing skid, starboard side.

parts.name: Skid Cross-Tube (Front)
parts.role: Forward cross-tube tying the two skids together.

parts.name: Skid Cross-Tube (Rear)
parts.role: Aft cross-tube tying the two skids together.

parts.name: Cabin Strut (Front-Left)
parts.role: Vertical strut connecting port skid to cabin floor.

parts.name: Cabin Strut (Front-Right)
parts.role: Vertical strut connecting starboard skid to cabin floor.

parts.name: Cabin Strut (Rear-Left)
parts.role: Vertical strut connecting port skid to cabin floor.

parts.name: Cabin Strut (Rear-Right)
parts.role: Vertical strut connecting starboard skid to cabin floor.

parts.name: Battery Pack
parts.role: Liquid-cooled lithium-polymer battery modules (full redundancy across independent power channels). ≈2 h recharge.

parts.name: Cabin Floor Pan
parts.role: Composite floor pan supporting the seats, battery, and cabin shell.

parts.name: Passenger Cabin Shell
parts.role: Spheroidal two-seat passenger cabin (composite monocoque). Seats two side-by-side; touchscreen on the centre console selects destination.

parts.name: Panoramic Windshield
parts.role: Curved panoramic windshield giving forward visibility for both passengers.

parts.name: Gull-Wing Door (Port)
parts.role: Upward-hinged gull-wing passenger door, port side.

parts.name: Gull-Wing Door (Starboard)
parts.role: Upward-hinged gull-wing passenger door, starboard side.

parts.name: Rear Avionics Fairing
parts.role: Aerodynamic fairing covering the aft avionics bay and command-link antennas.

parts.name: Avionics & Flight Control Bay
parts.role: Triple-redundant flight controller, IMU stack, GNSS receivers, and 4G/5G command-and-control link.

parts.name: Central Rotor Hub
parts.role: Structural hub above the cabin into which all eight arms key; routes power and signal cables to each motor pair.

parts.name: Arm (Forward)
parts.role: Tubular composite arm radiating forward from the hub.

parts.name: Arm (Forward-Port)
parts.role: Tubular composite arm, 45° forward-port.

parts.name: Arm (Port)
parts.role: Tubular composite arm, port (+Z).

parts.name: Arm (Aft-Port)
parts.role: Tubular composite arm, 45° aft-port.

parts.name: Arm (Aft)
parts.role: Tubular composite arm radiating aft from the hub.

parts.name: Arm (Aft-Starboard)
parts.role: Tubular composite arm, 45° aft-starboard.

parts.name: Arm (Starboard)
parts.role: Tubular composite arm, starboard (-Z).

parts.name: Arm (Forward-Starboard)
parts.role: Tubular composite arm, 45° forward-starboard.

parts.name: Motor #1 (Forward, upper)
parts.role: Brushless DC outrunner driving the upper coaxial propeller on the forward arm.

parts.name: Motor #2 (Forward, lower)
parts.role: Brushless DC outrunner driving the lower coaxial propeller on the forward arm.

parts.name: Motor #3 (Fwd-Port, upper)
parts.role: Upper coaxial motor on the forward-port arm.

parts.name: Motor #4 (Fwd-Port, lower)
parts.role: Lower coaxial motor on the forward-port arm.

parts.name: Motor #5 (Port, upper)
parts.role: Upper coaxial motor on the port arm.

parts.name: Motor #6 (Port, lower)
parts.role: Lower coaxial motor on the port arm.

parts.role: Upper fixed-pitch composite propeller, forward arm. Counter-rotating coaxial pair with prop_n_bot.

parts.role: 4G/5G command-and-control link antenna to the EHang ground command center.

parts.role: White anti-collision strobe atop the cabin.

parts.role: Red port navigation light at the port arm tip.

parts.role: Green starboard navigation light at the starboard arm tip.
